$comment: Ticket 10 - Spar SFX manifest. Every clip is ORIGINAL audio synthesized by scripts/generate_sfx.py from math primitives (no samples, no third-party recordings). The project owns these bytes outright, so all are commercial-use safe. Format matches what the frontend loads (frontend/src/services/audioManager.ts): mono, 44100 Hz, 16-bit PCM WAV. Durations are in seconds and reproducible (RNG seeded per clip).

sounds.description: Paper whoosh + pitched tick for dealing a card.
Crisp 'fwip' with rising blip and noise transient.
Signature 'thwack': low thump body + bright click + quick pitch drop. Most-played card sound.
Subtle high UI blip for card hover.
Riffle shuffle: a run of short filtered-noise ticks.
Upward sparkle sweep with bright pings for raking in cards.
Bright ascending major arpeggio (C-E-G-C) with a short echo.
Triumphant fanfare: rising arpeggio into a held major chord stab.
Deflating descending 'doom' with a dour low chord.
Cheeky descending square 'boing' for a face-down dry declaration.
Brighter ascending square + sparkle for a face-up show-dry declaration.

sounds.soundalike_of: arcade announcer 'on fire!' hype sting (Mortal Kombat / NBA Jam vibe)
sounds.soundalike_note: EVOKES, does not copy. Built from a crackle (high-passed noise), a rising sweep, a bright chord stab, and a generic formant 'exclamation' blip. No sampled recording, no words, no pitch-contour or timbre match of any trademarked clip.
sounds.description: Fire-streak 'on fire!' sting played when a win streak ignites.
Icy crystalline shimmer descending with a glassy tremolo.

sounds.repurpose_note: Ticket 10: off-suit plays are LEGAL now (flag/challenge-policed), so this is no longer a 'wrong suit' cue. Intended trigger: the pre-leader rejection - a follower attempting to open a trick before the leader has led. Wire the emit at that rejection site when it lands; the trigger site is not yet present on this branch, so no wiring was invented. See code comments at frontend/src/services/audioManager.ts and frontend/src/game/constants/animations.ts (SOUND_EVENTS.INVALID_MOVE).

sounds.description: Swelling whoosh sweep marking a new game phase.

sounds.soundalike_of: surprise arcade 'toasty!' easter-egg shout (Mortal Kombat vibe)
sounds.soundalike_note: EVOKES, does not copy. A quick high rising vocal-ish formant blip (generic rising vowel) with a tiny noise onset and a bright tail ping. No sampled recording, no word, no timbre/pitch match of any trademarked clip.
sounds.description: Easter-egg 'toasty' byte. Asset is generated but NOT yet wired into the loader (audioManager SOUND_CONFIG intentionally left at 16 keys to keep existing tests green). Intended trigger: a rare random easter-egg moment (e.g. a fast/flashy card play or streak spike). Add a 'sound:toasty' key to SOUND_CONFIG and update the audioManager/PreloadScene sound-count tests when wiring it in.
